cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.0)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

project(lore-game VERSION 1.0.0)

if ("$ENV{VCPKG_ROOT}" STREQUAL "")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "`VCPKG_ROOT` is not a defined environment variable. Please install vcpkg and define the VCPKG_ROOT variable.")
endif()

include($ENV{VCPKG_ROOT}/scripts/buildsystems/vcpkg.cmake)

file(READ ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/config.json CONFIG_FILE)
file(GENERATE
    OUTPUT ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/engine/config.hpp
    CONTENT
"// Autogenerated from config.json
#pragma once
#include <nlohmann/json.hpp>
inline const nlohmann::json config = nlohmann::json::parse(R\"(${CONFIG_FILE})\");"
    TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME}
)

file(GLOB_RECURSE SOURCES CONFIGURE_DEPENDS src/*.cpp)
add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME} src/main.cpp)

if (NOT APPLE)
    add_compile_definitions(PARALLEL=true)
endif()

include(FetchContent)

FetchContent_Declare(
    raylib
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/raysan5/raylib.git
)
FetchContent_Declare(
    fmt
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/fmtlib/fmt.git
)
FetchContent_Declare(
    discord-rpc
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/EclipseMenu/discord-presence.git
    GIT_TAG main
)
FetchContent_Declare(
    nlohmann_json
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nlohmann/json.git
    GIT_TAG develop
)

FetchContent_MakeAvailable(raylib fmt discord-rpc nlohmann_json)

execute_process(COMMAND vcpkg install curl)
find_package(CURL REQUIRED)

target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC ${VCPKG_INSTALLED_DIR}${VCPKG_TARGET_TRIPLET}/include)
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC raylib fmt discord-rpc nlohmann_json CURL::libcurl)

add_custom_command(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME} POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy_directory
    ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/resources
    ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/resources
    COMMENT "Copying /resources to Build directory"
)
